author: Brandjuh
name: eventpinger
description: Pings the Notify-Event role and the resolved region role when MissionChief posts alliance missions or alliance events.
install_msg: eventpinger installed. It listens to the hardcoded MissionChief event channel and pings Notify-Event plus a resolved region role when the address is clear.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data. It reads MissionChief event announcement messages in one configured Discord channel and sends role pings based on the event address.
